creator: eadler@FreeBSD.org
text:
--- Makefile    2009-11-22 11:55:21.000000000 +0200
+++ Makefile.old        2009-11-22 11:55:16.000000000 +0200
@@ -6,12 +6,12 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=      nano
-PORTVERSION=   2.1.11
+PORTVERSION=   2.1.99
 CATEGORIES=    editors
 MASTER_SITES=  http://www.nano-editor.org/dist/v2.1/ \
                http://www.ewtoo.org/~astyanax/nano/dist/v2.1/
 PKGNAMESUFFIX= -devel
-DISTNAME=      nano-${PORTVERSION}
+DISTNAME=      nano-${PORTVERSION}pre2
 
 MAINTAINER=    EitanAdlerList@gmail.com
 COMMENT=       Nano's ANOther editor, an enhanced free Pico clone
